[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *renovate[bot]*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@vrothberg I think we can just use actions/checkout@v4 to avoid these renovate PR's? It looks like we initially wanted to do that [here](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/20109/files) but it was closed without merging. I can spin up a fix?
